speeches.name: Jerome Powell
speeches.summary: Powell stated the FOMC decided to keep the federal funds rate unchanged at 3.5-3.75%, viewing the current policy stance as appropriate for dual mandate goals amid elevated inflation from energy prices and Middle East uncertainties.

speeches.name: Christopher Waller
speeches.summary: Waller spoke on modernizing reserve bank operations in a speech listed alongside the FOMC statement.

macro_fred.narrative: Leaning Hawkish: CPI at 3.3%, Fed Funds at 3.64%, unemployment at 4.3%.
